title: Review and publish Individual Confirmation scope-clarification draft if approved
description: A new draft version of Medication Review: Individual Confirmation has been created to make the bounded medication-review segment requirement explicit, forbid pooling scattered medication mentions across the call, and state that truncated fragments do not count unless the actual review exchange is visible. Draft version: f1040a1b-ab02-48db-9ed6-18af22703c55. Review the wording and promote/publish only after explicit approval.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: User explicitly requested promotion of the Individual Confirmation scope-clarification draft version f1040a1b-ab02-48db-9ed6-18af22703c55. Proceeding with champion switch request now, alongside the Dosage alignment work.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Promoted Individual Confirmation draft version f1040a1b-ab02-48db-9ed6-18af22703c55 to champion per user request.
